title: SQLite setup + embedded migrations (sqlx-migrate)
description: Initialize the SQLite database with the full schema from the spec and set up sqlx-migrate for embedded migrations. Apply all SQLite PRAGMAs on every connection. The schema includes: admin, accounts, remote_accounts, posts, remote_posts, mentions, media, follows, follow_requests, followers, favourites, notifications, oauth_apps, oauth_tokens, oauth_authz_codes, domain_blocks, delivery_queue, idempotency_keys, also_known_as.
design: Use sqlx::SqlitePool. Apply PRAGMAs via after_connect hook on pool creation. Embed migrations with sqlx::migrate!() macro pointing at migrations/ directory.
acceptance_criteria: sqlx::query! macros compile against the schema; all tables and indexes created correctly; PRAGMAs applied: journal_mode=WAL, synchronous=NORMAL, foreign_keys=ON, busy_timeout=5000, cache_size=-64000; migrations run automatically on startup
